title: Folk Protocol Content Population Strategy
content:
## Goal
Aggressively populate folkprotocol site with high-quality herb/materia content using parallel sonnet agents

## Current State
- Site structure ready (Astro + content schemas)
- No content yet (empty directories)
- Minor technical issues (collection name mismatches)

## Proposed Parallel Agent Strategy

### Wave 1: Technical Setup (1 agent)
Fix collection references in pages, create seed examples

### Wave 2: Core Herbs (5 parallel agents, sonnet, shards)
- Agent 1: Adaptogens (Ashwagandha, Rhodiola, Holy Basil, Ginseng)
- Agent 2: Nervines (Passionflower, Skullcap, Lemon Balm, Valerian)
- Agent 3: Immune (Elderberry, Echinacea, Astragalus, Reishi)
- Agent 4: Digestive (Ginger, Peppermint, Chamomile, Fennel)
- Agent 5: Anti-inflammatory (Turmeric, Boswellia, Willow Bark)

### Wave 3: Protocols (3 parallel agents, sonnet, shards)
- Agent 1: Stress/Sleep/Cognitive protocols
- Agent 2: Digestive/Inflammation/Joint protocols
- Agent 3: Immune/Energy/Cardiovascular protocols

## Content Philosophy
- Evidence-aware but not RCT-obsessed
- Include traditional convergent use
- Practical self-experimentation guidance
- Rich sensory descriptions
- Cross-referenced (herbs <-> protocols)
